verses.text: Kei hong hehpih in Pasian aw, nang hong bel ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Siatna huihpi a ven' mateng na kha liimah kong bu ding hi
A Sangpen Pasian' tungah, keima deihna a hong tungsak Pasian' tungah ka ko hi
Amah in vantung panin keimah hong dawngin hong honkhia ding a, amah in kei hong tuancilte maizumin a koih ding hi. Pasian in ama itna kip leh a thumanna hong lak ding hi
Huaihamna tawh mihing a netum, humpinelkai tawh a kibang mite' lakah ka om hithiat hi. Amau' hate, namsau hiam tawh kibang hi
Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthan'na omsak in
Amaute in keima khe, thang hong siah uh a, lungkhamin hong koih uh hi. Ka paina ding munah gum khat to uh a, ahih hangin tua gum sungah amaute mah kia uh hi
Ka lungmuang hi, Pasian aw, ka lungmuang hi. La ka sa ding a, nakpi takin ka sa ding hi
Ka tho ding hi. Harp lasakna leh laia lasakna aw, tho ta un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning
Topa aw, mite lakah lungdam kong ko ding a, minamte lakah nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipi banto hi
Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthan'na omsak in.
